sections.body: Critical robot control stays native while storytelling blocks refresh instantly from the CDN.

sections.title: What executives see
sections.body: Voice-authenticated control, safety alerts, Garmin telemetry, and OTA coaching surfaces all live in one companion.

sections.title: Highlights
bullets: OTAs hit every device without app store approval
Per-partner branding is just another module entry
Offline cache keeps the demo moving even without LTE

sections.body: Close pilot funding in Q2 with 5 hybrid-enabled demo routes

modules.title: Safety & Alerting

sections.body: Owner-only wake phrase controls the robot, triggers audible warnings, and broadcasts SMS ahead of the runner.

sections.title: Live reminders
bullets: Monitor Garmin HR for safety pauses
Use SMS macro if LTE is weak

sections.body: If any module fails to load, tap 'Check for updates' on the welcome card or open the Hybrid Modules screen for detailed logs.
